name: PowerShell Command History Clearing/Disabling Detected
description: Detects attempts to clear or disable PowerShell command history, a common defense evasion technique used by adversaries.

prompts.prompt: Suspicious PowerShell command history clearing/disabling detected on **{computer_name}**. The user **{user}** executed a command ('`{command_line}`') to remove or disable the PowerShell history logs. This is a high-risk defense evasion tactic that could indicate an attacker attempting to hide their tracks. Immediate investigation is required to determine the context and purpose of this action, and the parent process **{parent_image}** should also be analyzed.

parameters.name: computer_name
parameters.description: The hostname of the computer where the event occurred.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that ran the PowerShell command.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line that was executed.

parameters.name: parent_image
parameters.description: The parent process that launched the PowerShell command.
